creators.name: Nick Saraev
creators.blurb: Practical AI automation and agency builds from someone shipping real systems.

videos.title: I Built a $1M/y SaaS with Claude Code, Here's How
videos.summary: Nick Saraev describes building Clairvo, a $1M/year SaaS using Claude Code and AI agents to improve call pickup rates through techniques like algorithmic predictive pacing. He advocates for using Claude to enumerate business opportunities and emphasizes that human moats and real-world problem-solving matter more than model choice in successful automation businesses.

videos.title: How to Build Mobile Apps with Claude Code: Full Course (2026)
videos.summary: Nick Saraev provides a full course on mobile app development with Claude Code, covering iOS and Android app creation, Expo/React Native framework, Supabase integration, and AI functionality. The course walks through setting up a development environment, app design frameworks, and builds three example apps: a habit tracker, calorie tracker with AI, and Pomodoro timer, then shows how to submit to app stores.

videos.title: How to Use Claude Code for FREE (2026)
videos.summary: Nick Saraev demonstrates how to use Claude Code with free or low-cost alternatives including NVIDIA-NIM, OpenRouter, Ollama for local models, and DeepSeek V4 Flash. The video covers setup workflows for each integration option in a structured tutorial format.

videos.title: Claude Opus-4.7 Just Dropped, And...
videos.summary: Nick Saraev announces the release of Claude Opus-4.7. The video covers this new model alongside content about automation tools and agentic workflows. Saraev shares practical experience building automated businesses and uses the platform to promote related software tools and courses.
